GaussClaw Dashboard

The Rust + Axum backend is live. The React 19 + Vite + Tailwind frontend ports verbatim from the upstream Hermes dashboard and lands in a follow-on slice. Until then this placeholder confirms the server is reachable and the embedded-asset pipeline is working.

The API surface is already wired:

GET /api/status
GET /api/health
GET /api/config
GET /api/config/schema
GET /api/sessions
GET /api/providers
GET /api/tools
GET /api/receipt/head
WS /api/chat/ws

See GAUSSCLAW_ROADMAP.md Phase 1 Task 4 for the frontend port plan. The dashboard runs natively on Linux, macOS, and Windows; no PTY required, no WSL2 constraint.
